query: SELECT operador, mesano, situacao, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(troco) as total_troco FROM febraban WHERE operador LIKE '%JH299827%' AND mesano = 526 GROUP BY operador, mesano, situacao;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT operador, mesano, situacao, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(troco) as total_troco FROM febraban WHERE operador LIKE '%JH299827%' AND mesano = 526 GROUP BY operador, mesano, situacao;
